text: рџЋЇ Band Score Oshirish в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ Grammar range'ni oshirish uchun faqat murakkab zamonlardan foydalanish shart emas. Juda oddiy usul: bitta oddiy gap va bitta murakkab gapni aralashtirib yozing. Inversion, conditional (If) gaplar yoki passive voice'ni 2-3 marta o'z o'rnida ishlatish Band 7.0 uchun yetarli bo'ladi. Esda tuting: gramatika murakkab bo'lishi emas, to'g'ri va xatosiz bo'lishi muhimroq.
